raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Listing websites such as Yelp and third-party platforms like Grubhub do not inform consumers when calls are being tracked or monitored.",
    "Over 40,000 restaurants have closed in California due to the impacts of COVID-19.",
    "Asian restaurants have a significantly higher rate of closure than non-Asian restaurants during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "Roughly half of the Chinese restaurants in the U.S. have closed because of COVID-19.",
    "Small businesses are increasingly relying on third-party food delivery platforms due to the necessity created by COVID-19.",
    "Small businesses are operating with narrow margins that are becoming smaller due to high fees from third-party ordering applications.",
    "AB 1444 requires listing services to provide clear information about contacting a restaurant.",
    "AB 1444 ensures that restaurant owners are only charged for calls that result in orders.",
    "A food delivery platform shall not charge a food facility a referral fee for any calls that do not result in orders.",
    "A listing website must disclose if an order may result in a commission or fee to a party other than the food facility."
  ]
}
```
